name: io.github.beepboop2025/groundcheck
description: Verify factual claims (verdict + citations) and resolve securities to FIGI identity over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: GROUNDCHECK_ENGINE_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the Groundcheck evidence engine. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8723 for a local engine; set to https://groundcheck.seiche.info to use the hosted engine.
